cases.canonical_receipt_rule: Creates first canonical ingress receipt for this delivery.
cases.gateway_action: Authenticate, dedupe, checkpoint, and pass to normalization.
cases.mutation_permission: Allowed only after normalization and control-plane merge.

cases.canonical_receipt_rule: Must point at the existing canonical ingress receipt.
cases.gateway_action: Persist duplicate receipt with canonical_ingress_receipt_ref and skip second normalization.

cases.canonical_receipt_rule: May create a receipt, but cannot create a normalized response.
cases.gateway_action: Persist proof and quarantine for investigation; do not normalize to legal mutation.
cases.mutation_permission: None until stronger lineage proof exists.

cases.canonical_receipt_rule: No canonical settlement mutation until ambiguity is resolved.
cases.gateway_action: Checkpoint the payload and block mutation pending operator or reconciliation investigation.

cases.canonical_receipt_rule: Cannot become a settlement witness without later strong binding evidence.
cases.gateway_action: Persist authenticated ingress evidence and route to quarantine.

cases.canonical_receipt_rule: No canonical receipt for settlement purposes.
cases.gateway_action: Reject mutation, emit high-severity audit evidence, and preserve transport investigation details.

cases.canonical_receipt_rule: Each delivery gets its own receipt; active_response_id changes only through merge control.
cases.gateway_action: Checkpoint and normalize, then route to merge or reconciliation rather than direct overwrite.
cases.mutation_permission: Only through reconciliation or admissible merge rules.
